title: Spicy Silky Comforting Egyptian Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: This spicy and silky comfort dish is perfect for a Mediterranean-inspired dinner featuring roasted chickpeas with a touch of heat.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Add chickpeas, cumin, paprika, and cayenne pepper if using. Stir well to combine ingredients evenly.
Pour the lemon juice into the pan and mix thoroughly with the chickpeas. Season with salt as needed.
Spread the mixture in an even layer on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Roast for 10-12 minutes, shaking the pan halfway through, until heated through and slightly crispy around the edges.
Serve hot garnished with fresh parsley.
